prompt: A photorealistic luxury high-rise terrace at sunset overlooking a dense modern skyline, viewed from a wide-angle perspective along a curved outdoor walkway. The scene is empty of people and bathed in warm peach, blush, and golden-hour light with gentle atmospheric haze. On the right, a contemporary building facade with smooth beige concrete, a deep overhang, floor-to-ceiling glass, and bold rust-red wall panels curves into the frame. On the left, a clear glass safety railing runs diagonally toward the distance, revealing the city below. Include exactly 3 large circular built-in planters along the terrace edge, each in a muted terracotta tone and filled with ornamental grasses, low shrubs, and small sculptural trees; the nearest planter is prominent in the foreground. In the background, show a cluster of sleek skyscrapers with reflective glass and clean rectangular forms, including 1 especially tall, slender central tower and several slightly shorter towers around it. The floor is smooth pale concrete with long soft shadows and a calm minimalist feel. Architectural photography style, ultra-detailed, realistic materials, subtle reflections, elegant luxury residential design, serene upscale urban atmosphere.
